title: senecio napellifolius
intro: Senecio napellifolius, also known as Ragwort or Butterfly plant, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the daisy family, native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic, antispasmodic, and expectorant, which have been utilized to treat various health issues such as fever, coughs, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Senecio napellifolius include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Senecio napellifolius were made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
